content_en: 'Umar (&) asked 'Ali: "What do you think about a man who has intercourse with his wife when she is menstmating?" He said: Financial andjudiciary institutions at the time of 'Ali "He does not have to offer expiation, but he has to repent."64 The Urnmah is unanimously agreed that it is h a r h to have intercourse with a menstruating woman, and there is no difference of opinion,65 because Allah (B) says: %They ask you concerning menstruation. Say that is an Adha [a harmful thing for a husband to have a sexual intercourse with his wife while she is having her menses], therefore, keep away from women during menses and go not unto them till they are purified [from menses and have taken a bath]. And when they have purified themselves, then go in unto them as AUah has ordained for you.) (Quran 2: 222)
